name: research-report
description: Canonical section ordering for research reports. Used by SKILL.md and report-pdf.py.

sections.label: Frontmatter
sections.description: YAML metadata: title, date, source count, domain

sections.label: Executive Summary
sections.description: 2-4 paragraphs of key findings, tensions, and confidence level. Written in the user's voice.

sections.label: Findings
sections.description: Detailed findings organized by sub-question or theme. Each includes claim, evidence, confidence tag, and citations.

sections.label: Perspectives
sections.description: Multiple viewpoints with plausibility tier assignments (Strong/Moderate/Weak/Speculative) and supporting evidence.

sections.label: Confidence Assessment
sections.description: 5-dimension qualitative self-assessment: Source Quality, Consensus, Recency, Domain Familiarity, Evidence Strength.

sections.label: Quantitative Analysis
sections.description: Conditional. Computational exploration of numerical claims. Includes scripts used and their output.

sections.label: Methodology
sections.description: Search strategy: queries used, sources consulted, access limitations, verification approach.

sections.label: Sources & Citations
sections.description: Full citation list with verification statuses (Verified/Retrieved/Training Data/Unverifiable).
